title: canarium karoense
intro: Canarium karoense, also known as the karuka or kauka, is a tree species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canarium karoense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Canarium karoense can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
